text: No person shall occupy a trailer while it is being moved upon a public highway. Any person who violates any provision of this section commits a class B traffic infraction.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-1405 — Riding in trailers

No person shall occupy a trailer while it is being moved upon a public highway. Any person who violates any provision of this section commits a class B traffic infraction.
